summary: Representative deterministic proof that Cautilus exposes machine-readable packet surfaces with provenance, status summaries, and bounded next-work routes for other tools.

evidenceScope.targetSurface: core packet, provenance, status-summary, and next-work route surfaces
evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the master-plan claim about representative machine-readable packets, provenance, status summaries, and bounded next-work routes is marked satisfied.
notClaimed: Every CLI command has the same resumability contract.
Every packet-consuming external tool is already implemented.
Human-readable reports replace JSON packets as the source of truth.
Every remaining claim has complete evidence or eval coverage.

protectedBehaviors: `doctor status --json` emits orientation and next branches without an input packet.
`discover claims status` summarizes existing claim packets and preserves git freshness state.
`evaluate claims plan` writes a `cautilus.claim_eval_plan.v1` intermediate plan.
`discover claims validate` writes a `cautilus.claim_validation_report.v1` report and fails invalid evidence.
Claim status summaries preserve bounded sample claims for tool consumption.
Claim summaries include satisfied evidence state.
Status summaries expose action routing over the current claim packet.

commandEvidence.command: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d /tmp/cautilus-master-plan-packets-XXXXXX); ./bin/cautilus doctor commands --json > "$tmpdir/commands.json"; ./bin/cautilus doctor status --repo-root . --json > "$tmpdir/doctor-status.json"; ./bin/cautilus discover claims status --input .cautilus/claims/evidenced-typed-runners.json --output "$tmpdir/claim-status-summary.json" --sample-claims 2; ./bin/cautilus discover claims validate --claims .cautilus/claims/evidenced-typed-runners.json --output "$tmpdir/claim-validation.json"; ./bin/cautilus evaluate claims plan --claims .cautilus/claims/evidenced-typed-runners.json --output "$tmpdir/claim-eval-plan.json"

decision.reason: Representative app and runtime tests plus live CLI probes show schema-versioned command, doctor, claim-status, validation, and eval-plan packets with git provenance, status summaries, action buckets, cross-cutting signals, and recommended next actions consumable by other tools.
